events.event_description: U.S. Embassy in Cyprus established; Louis Douglas Heck presented credentials as the first Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, marking the opening of the U.S. diplomatic mission coinciding with Cypriot independence.

evidence.quote: Louis Douglas Heck, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1960-08-16.

events.event_description: Fraser Wilkins presented credentials as the first Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary to Cyprus, confirming full Embassy status with a resident Ambassador.

evidence.quote: Fraser Wilkins, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1960-08-27. Credentials presented: 1960-09-19. Left post on 1964-04-06.
